Name: Jasper NIN Events
Description: General-purpose Ninja event profile for PvE. Keeps role mitigation, Shade Shift recovery, earlier self-heal recovery, normal 2+ target AoE/helper and burst release, ranged/Ninjutsu/Ninki toggle safety, Leg Sweep/Arm's Length utility, wipe/zone reset scaffolding, compact manual controls, and optional out-of-combat Sprint for roulette-safe play. ForceAOE is manual-only and is never reset by this profile.

Events.Name: Bloodbath
Events.Description: Uses Bloodbath around 70 percent HP for steadier melee recovery.

Events.Name: Second Wind
Events.Description: Uses Second Wind at 60 percent HP for earlier self-recovery.

Events.Name: Leg Sweep Stun
Events.Description: Uses Leg Sweep on casting enemies in melee range.

Events.Name: Arm's Length Emergency
Events.Description: Uses Arm's Length when you are stationary, low on HP, and holding multiple mobs.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles
Events.Description: Restores normal Ninja ACR toggles while safely out of combat.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles Zone Change
Events.Description: Restores default Ninja toggles after zone changes.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles Wipe
Events.Description: Restores default Ninja toggles after wipes.

Events.Name: Shade Shift TB
Events.Description: Uses Shade Shift for incoming tankbusters.

Events.Name: Feint TB
Events.Description: Uses Feint for incoming tankbusters when the target is not already debuffed.

Events.Name: Shade Shift Emergency
Events.Description: Uses Shade Shift when self HP drops low outside scripted raidwide handling.

Events.Name: DPS Toggle Safety
Events.Description: Keeps Ninja burst, AoE, ranged, Ninjutsu, Ninki, Raiju, and utility helper toggles healthy in combat so imported or held states do not leave the job passive.

Events.Name: Multi-Target AoE Release
Events.Description: Keeps normal Ninja AoE, Ninjutsu, Ninki, Raiju, and burst helper toggles enabled on 2+ enemy pulls without touching ForceAOE.

Conditions.Name: Second Wind <= 65%
Conditions.Description: Self HP threshold for earlier Second Wind recovery.

Conditions.Name: Self HP <= 70%
Conditions.Description: Self HP threshold for Bloodbath use.

Conditions.Name: Self HP <= 70%
Conditions.Description: Self HP threshold for Shade Shift emergency use.

Conditions.Name: Leg Sweep Cast in Range
Conditions.Description: Target is casting within Leg Sweep range.

Logics.Name: Bloodbath
Logics.Description: Uses Bloodbath around 70 percent HP for steadier melee recovery.

Logics.Name: Second Wind
Logics.Description: Uses Second Wind at 60 percent HP for earlier self-recovery.

Logics.Name: Reset Toggles
Logics.Description: Restores normal Ninja ACR defaults out of combat, including AoE, ranged, Ninjutsu, Ninki, Raiju, and utility helper toggles. ForceAOE is untouched.

Logics.Name: Shade Shift TB
Logics.Description: Uses Shade Shift for incoming tankbusters.

Logics.Name: Feint TB
Logics.Description: Uses Feint for incoming tankbusters when the target is not already debuffed.

Logics.Name: Shade Shift Emergency
Logics.Description: Uses Shade Shift when self HP drops low outside scripted raidwide handling.

Logics.Name: Leg Sweep Stun
Logics.Description: Uses Leg Sweep on casting enemies in melee range.

Logics.Name: Arm's Length Emergency
Logics.Description: Uses Arm's Length as self-defense when stationary below 70 percent HP with two or more mobs on you.

Logics.Name: DPS Toggle Safety
Logics.Description: Keeps Ninja burst, AoE, ranged, Ninjutsu, Ninki, Raiju, and utility helper toggles healthy in combat so imported or held states do not leave the job passive.

Logics.Name: Multi-Target AoE Release
Logics.Description: Keeps normal Ninja AoE, Ninjutsu, Ninki, Raiju, and burst helper toggles enabled on 2+ enemy pulls without touching ForceAOE.

Items.Name: Boss Hold
Items.Description: Optional routing helper that saves Ninja burst near the end of a boss. Leave off for normal play.

Items.Name: Pack Hold
Items.Description: Optional routing helper that saves Ninja burst near the end of a trash pack. Leave off for normal play.

Items.Name: Feint
Items.Description: Uses Feint for raidwide and tankbuster mitigation windows.

Items.Name: Shade
Items.Description: Uses Shade Shift for raidwide, tankbuster, and emergency recovery support.

Items.Name: Self Guard
Items.Description: Uses Bloodbath, Second Wind, and Arm's Length for personal recovery.

Items.Name: Stun
Items.Description: Uses Leg Sweep on cast targets in melee range.
